  "findings": [
    "Inadequate bracing and kickers to withstand lateral concrete pour pressure",
    "Risk of formwork blowout, structural failure, and worker injury during concrete placement"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Issue an immediate stop-work order on concrete placement for this formwork",
    "Install additional kickers, bracing, and strongbacks in accordance with ACI 347 design lateral pressure requirements",
    "Obtain sign-off from a qualified person or structural engineer prior to resuming the pour"
  ],
  "rationale": "The formwork bracing is inadequate to resist the calculated lateral pressures of the concrete pour as required by ACI 347. Pouring concrete under these conditions poses an immediate risk of catastrophic form blowout, structural failure, and severe injury to workers.",
  "references": [
    "ACI 347 (Guide to Formwork for Concrete)"
  ]
}
